overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character descending a grassy cliffside to a sandy beach and walking along the coastline. The scene features bright midday lighting with clear blue skies, turquoise ocean water, and dramatic rocky formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy cliffside with rocky outcrops overlooking ocean

events.description: character jumps down from rocky ledge to lower elevation
ground surface transitions from grass and rock to sandy beach

agents.ego_description: navigating down a grassy cliffside through tall white grass and rocky terrain toward the beach below

entered.detail: tall white pampas grass covering the cliffside
large gray rock formations forming the cliff edge
turquoise blue ocean water visible in the distance
golden sand beach visible at the base of the cliff
prominent boulder on the cliff path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through dense tall white grass on a cliffside overlooking the ocean. Rocky outcrops line the right side while the sandy beach is visible far below. The character descends the slope and jumps down rocky ledges toward the beach level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach along coastline with rocky cliffs

events.description: passing a small dark cave entrance in the rocky cliffside on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach with the ocean on the left and rocky cliffs on the right, moving toward distant coastal formations

entered.detail: dark cave opening in the rock wall along the beach
scattered rocks along the shoreline at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open sandy beach with the turquoise ocean on the left and tall rocky cliffs on the right. The terrain is flat and expansive, with distant mountain formations visible across the water. The character passes by a small cave entrance in the cliff wall while maintaining a steady pace along the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character descends from a grassy cliffside to a wide, sunlit coastline. It begins with the character pushing through dense, tall white grass atop a cliff, moving past rocky outcrops while the sandy beach remains visible far below. As the character descends the slope, the camera follows a series of jumps down rocky ledges until the terrain levels out onto the shore. The scene then expands into an open sandy beach, where the character walks between the turquoise ocean on the left and towering cliffs on the right. This steady progression along the shoreline continues past a small cave entrance in the cliff wall, with distant mountain formations framing the horizon across the water.
